overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk urban homeless encampment beneath a massive highway overpass at night. The player character walks through makeshift tents and food stalls with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the background, characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the encampment past tents and a yellow food cart vendor

person sitting near the red and white tent entrance

entered.detail: food cart with large yellow umbrella and illuminated menu display
camping tent with red and white striped rainfly
large illuminated advertisement screen showing cartoon character

massive concrete highway overpass structure overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit homeless encampment beneath a massive concrete overpass. A yellow food cart with an illuminated umbrella stands prominently on the right, while makeshift tents occupy the left side. Digital billboards glow in the background, casting colored light on the wet concrete ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: encampment interior with graffiti-covered concrete walls

events.description: camera turns revealing large wall with BROKEN graffiti painted in white letters

agents.ego_description: navigating around the encampment center, passing by a warming fire

notable_agents.action: person standing near the graffiti-covered wall
individual sitting by a small fire in a metal barrel

entered.detail: concrete wall with large white graffiti spelling BROKEN
metal barrel with fire burning inside providing warmth

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the encampment, the camera passes a concrete wall tagged with large white graffiti reading BROKEN. A fire burns in a metal barrel providing warmth to nearby inhabitants. The yellow food cart and initial tents fall behind as the path curves toward the back of the underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area approaching ramp to lower level

events.description: approaching concrete ramp structure leading down to lower encampment level

agents.ego_description: walking toward the ramp with neon-lit city skyline visible ahead

notable_agents.action: person sitting against concrete barrier near the ramp entrance

entered.detail: concrete staircase and ramp leading down to lower underpass level
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signs
concrete picnic tables and benches under black umbrellas

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider plaza area with outdoor seating under umbrellas. The massive city skyline rises in the background, filled with towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. A concrete ramp descends into the darkness ahead, while a lone figure sits against a barrier to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending ramp to lower underpass level

events.description: dialogue interaction with NPC in red clothing at top of ramp
entering darker lower level beneath the overpass as descent continues

agents.ego_description: walking down the concrete ramp into the lower encampment area, passing an NPC

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing standing at ramp entrance initiating dialogue

entered.detail: food cart with yellow and orange umbrella at bottom of ramp
scattered debris and garbage bags accumulated on concrete

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a concrete ramp into a darker, more enclosed underpass level. An NPC in red clothing stands at the entrance, engaging in dialogue. The lighting dims significantly as the descent continues, revealing another food cart at the bottom and scattered trash piles along the walls. The city skyline disappears from view as the camera moves deeper under the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit homeless encampment that gradually descends from an open urban plaza into a dark, enclosed underpass. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, passing a glowing yellow food cart and makeshift tents that cast colorful reflections on the wet ground. As the camera moves deeper, it glides past a concrete wall tagged with white graffiti and a burning metal barrel before the path curves and opens into a wider plaza. The scene then expands to reveal a towering city skyline filled with neon advertisements and outdoor seating, before turning toward a descending concrete ramp. Finally, the camera plunges down the ramp past a figure in red clothing, causing the skyline to vanish as the environment shifts into a dim, subterranean level filled with trash piles and another distant food cart.
